query: SELECT m.aeId, a.name, m.calYear, m.calMonth, m.demosTotal, m.dialCount FROM monthly_metrics m JOIN ae_profiles a ON m.aeId = a.id ORDER BY a.name, m.calYear, m.calMonth;
